calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jan-05-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petitioner: Peggy Altvater appeared with Counsel Judy Hitchcock, of Legal Assistance to the Elderly.

Respondent: Wesley Thomas was present in pro per.

Petitioner and Respondent were sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

Respondent stated that he agreed to the restraining order for the reasons set forth on the record and apologized to the Petitioner, after hearing the evidence presented, the Court Granted the Petitioner's order as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person: Peggy Altvater and her Residence.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

No Guns or Other Firearms/Turn In or Sell Guns or Firearms.

Expires January 5, 2014.

Order signed.
